source_formulae: P0R02897: The Lyapunov Function as Meta-Free-Energy:

P0R02898: The Lyapunov function, VL, can be interpreted as a "meta-free-energy." It doesn't measure the error in the system's model of the world, but the error in the system's own physical state relative to the optimal state for performing inference.

source_formulae: P0R02900: The control laws that minimise VL represent a form of meta-active-inference. The system is "acting" on its own parameters (the couplings K and noise ) to make its own state conform to a deep prior belief that it should be at the edge of chaos to be an effective learning system. This is the physical implementation of the system tuning its own precision for optimal belief updating.
